story.title: Terrence Tao's ChatGPT Conversation about the Jacobian Conjecture Counterexample

draft:
I just read about Terrence Tao's conversation with ChatGPT on the Jacobian Conjecture counterexample. 
Tao's exchange with ChatGPT reveals the AI's limitations in understanding complex math concepts. 
Key points from the conversation include ChatGPT's struggles with abstract algebra and its inability to provide a clear counterexample. 
Can AI systems like ChatGPT ever truly replace human intuition in math?
#AIinMath #JacobianConjecture #ChatGPT
